title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Paytm
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
